quotes.quote: The initial user input along with command outputs are treated as user messages to the Planner.
quotes.rationale: Command outputs are routed back to the controlling Planner, making execution feedback operational control.

quotes.quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
quotes.rationale: An error detected during execution triggers documentation lookup and candidate revision.

quotes.quote: Access to documentation enables us to provide sufficient information for Coscientist to conduct experiments in the physical world.
quotes.rationale: A dedicated documentation-consulting component supplies the specification against which protocols are checked.

quotes.quote: For this investigation, we did not grant access to the internet.
quotes.rationale: The reference corpus for this compliance channel was deliberately restricted in the reported run.

quotes.quote: The normalized advantage values increase over time, suggesting that the model can effectively reuse the information obtained to provide more specific guidance on reactivity.
quotes.rationale: Measured experimental outcomes are reused to steer subsequent experiment selection.

quotes.quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
quotes.rationale: The physical loop is reported as free of human decision-making despite manual plate handling.

quotes.quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.
quotes.rationale: Human labellers score outputs on a scale, and the source concedes inter-labeller variability without reporting an agreement study.

diagnostics.consequence: Aggregate-quality scores used for terminal assessment cannot be treated as reliable measurements, so headline performance claims rest on an unquantified subjective instrument.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

diagnostics.statement: The only reliability-relevant statement in the packet concerns human labelling, which the source acknowledges is subjective and may vary between labelers; no agreement or discrimination study is reported for this scoring channel.

diagnostics.consequence: Specification-compliance judgments may silently fail outside the curated documentation scope, so reported success may not generalize to open-corpus operation.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Access to documentation enables us to provide sufficient information for Coscientist to conduct experiments in the physical world.
For this investigation, we did not grant access to the internet.

diagnostics.statement: The documentation-based compliance channel operated on a deliberately restricted reference corpus with no internet access, and no validation of its retrieval or judgment correctness is reported.

diagnostics.consequence: The boundary of autonomous closure cannot be verified, leaving claims of unsupervised self-correction underdetermined by the source.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.

diagnostics.statement: Human authority over validation outputs, memory admission, and acceptance of self-corrected protocols is not stated; the packet reports only that no human decision-making entered the physical loop while plates were moved manually.

diagnostics.consequence: All validator reliability findings remain internal and unauditable, and reproducibility of the reported loop cannot be assessed externally.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.

diagnostics.statement: Data, code and prompts are withheld pending regulatory developments, so no independent replication or audit of any validator channel is possible from this source.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

recommendations.proposed_action: Run and report a multi-labeller agreement study for the subjective quality scale, with blinded labellers and per-item raw labels released alongside the agreement statistic.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: A pre-registered agreement threshold is met, with disagreement cases enumerated rather than averaged away
success_check.evidence_needed: Published labelling protocol, per-item raw labels, and the agreement computation
success_check.observable: Inter-rater agreement statistic across independent labellers on the same scored items

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Access to documentation enables us to provide sufficient information for Coscientist to conduct experiments in the physical world.
For this investigation, we did not grant access to the internet.

recommendations.proposed_action: Report a systematic error test of the documentation-search compliance channel on seeded specification errors, run under both the restricted corpus and an unrestricted corpus.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Error rates reported separately for restricted and open corpora with the gap stated
success_check.evidence_needed: Seeded-error test set, per-case judgments, and corpus configuration details
success_check.observable: Rate of incorrect protocol-compliance judgments on a held-out set of seeded specification errors

exact_quotes.exact_quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.

recommendations.proposed_action: Publish a per-stage human authority map covering validation, memory admission, and protocol revision, together with a dated or gated artifact-access path for the withheld data, code and prompts.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every validator channel has an explicit human-role value and at least one loop is replicable by a third party
success_check.evidence_needed: Published authority table and access procedure with a completed external replication attempt
success_check.observable: Stage-by-stage statement of human roles plus a documented artifact-access mechanism

memory_structure: conversational message history to the Planner including prior command outputs
accumulated experimental outcome information reused across iterations
policy_type: LLM Planner agent receiving user input and command outputs as messages
tool-augmented action selection (documentation search, code execution, robotic protocol execution)
